task: T9 add focused API and inventory UI tests

blockers: Backend inventory test covered same-brokerage assignment scoping but not true cross-brokerage or multi-brokerage context scoping for /api/v1/listings/mine.
Frontend verifier duplicated AgentListingsIndex search/filter/sort helper logic locally instead of exercising production helper behavior.
resolution: Added multi-brokerage inventory fixture where the same active user owns assigned listings in brokerage A and brokerage B; no X-Brokerage-Id now asserts fail-closed 409, and explicit brokerage B asserts only brokerage B rows are returned.

Replaced verifier-local applyInventoryView/matchesSearch/matchesStatus/matchesAttention/compareListings/dateValue copies with a runtime extraction of the InventoryView helper block from frontend/src/components/listings/AgentListingsIndex.tsx, exporting and importing the generated applyInventoryView module for behavior cases.

scope_control.pre_edit_status_summary: Worktree was already dirty with unrelated modified product files and untracked listing workspace files. tests/test_listing_inventory_api.py, frontend/scripts/verify-listings-workspace.mjs, and this evidence directory were untracked before this corrective task.

final_t9_cleanup.purpose: Reduce tests/test_listing_inventory_api.py below the 250 pure-LOC ceiling while preserving the corrected T9 backend and frontend verification coverage.
final_t9_cleanup.test_file_refactor: Collapsed repeated brokerage, member, profile, listing teardown, and response-id helpers inside tests/test_listing_inventory_api.py. The six behavior-focused tests and their assertions remain in the same file.

blockers: Missing backend coverage for primary_next_action == set_logistics when knowledge is ready but logistics is missing.
Missing T9 code-quality/slop artifact covering overfit, tautological tests, implementation-mirroring, unnecessary production extraction, scope drift, and secret handling.
resolution: Added test_my_listings_routes_ready_knowledge_missing_logistics_to_set_logistics with a ready knowledge summary, empty missing_information, no logistics row, lean row assertion, and primary_next_action set_logistics.
Added .omo/evidence/dalya-listings-workspace-rebrand/task-9-code-quality-review.md with the requested slop/code-quality review topics and bounded-risk assessment.

acceptance_checklist.criterion: backend normal row shape and attention fields
acceptance_checklist.scenario: Assigned agent requests /api/v1/listings/mine for seeded ready listing with buyer conversation, offer, viewing, missing knowledge, and absent logistics.
acceptance_checklist.binary_observable: test_my_listings_flags_missing_knowledge_and_logistics_for_attention passed; row key set equals LEAN_LISTING_KEYS and asserts title, live status, asking price, assigned agent, knowledge/logistics attention, missing_fact_count 1, buyer/open-offer/viewing counts.

acceptance_checklist.criterion: backend last_activity_at reflects latest seeded activity
acceptance_checklist.scenario: Same seeded listing has conversation updated at now-1h, knowledge at now-30m, offer at now-20m, viewing updated at now-5m, and listing creation at now-2d.
acceptance_checklist.binary_observable: test_my_listings_flags_missing_knowledge_and_logistics_for_attention passed with exact assertion listing.last_activity_at == expected now-5m viewing timestamp.

acceptance_checklist.criterion: backend ready knowledge with missing logistics routes to set logistics
acceptance_checklist.scenario: Assigned ready-property listing has DBListingKnowledgeSummary status ready, empty missing_information, and no logistics row.
acceptance_checklist.binary_observable: test_my_listings_routes_ready_knowledge_missing_logistics_to_set_logistics passed; row key set equals LEAN_LISTING_KEYS, knowledge_status ready, missing_fact_count 0, logistics_status needs_attention, and primary_next_action set_logistics.

acceptance_checklist.scenario: Non-managing assigned agent requests inventory in a brokerage that also has another agent's listing.
acceptance_checklist.binary_observable: test_my_listings_keeps_non_manager_scoped_to_own_or_assigned_listings passed; assigned listing id is present and hidden same-brokerage listing id is absent.

acceptance_checklist.scenario: Active member in brokerage with no listings requests /api/v1/listings/mine.
acceptance_checklist.binary_observable: test_my_listings_returns_empty_counts_for_empty_brokerage passed; response is empty listings with total_listings, total_conversations, and total_escalated all zero.

acceptance_checklist.scenario: Same user has active memberships and assigned listings in brokerage A and brokerage B, then requests /api/v1/listings/mine without X-Brokerage-Id.

acceptance_checklist.criterion: backend explicit brokerage context prevents cross-brokerage leaks
acceptance_checklist.scenario: Same multi-membership user selects brokerage B via X-Brokerage-Id while also having an assigned brokerage A listing.
acceptance_checklist.binary_observable: test_my_listings_respects_explicit_brokerage_context_for_multi_membership_user passed; returned listing_ids exactly equal the brokerage B listing id, so removing DBListing.brokerage_id == member.brokerage_id would leak the brokerage A listing and fail.

acceptance_checklist.criterion: frontend inventory behavior uses production helper logic
acceptance_checklist.scenario: Verifier reads AgentListingsIndex.tsx, extracts source from interface InventoryView through before function Metric, exports applyInventoryView in a temp module, fixes Date.now for recent-filter determinism, and imports that module for search/filter/sort cases.
acceptance_checklist.binary_observable: Verifier passed 25 checks; search/status/attention/recent/sort cases call imported applyInventoryView from the extracted production helper block, not local duplicate helper implementations.

acceptance_checklist.criterion: frontend action mapping and canonical href guard remain covered
acceptance_checklist.scenario: Verifier transpiles current listingIndexActions.ts and scans listing workspace source roots for legacy /dashboard/listings hrefs.
acceptance_checklist.binary_observable: 8 supported action href cases passed; unsupported action open_legacy_dashboard failed loudly; injected /dashboard/listings probe failed the scanner; 29 source files scanned with symlinks skipped.

acceptance_checklist.scenario: Next.js frontend type checking after verifier changes.

acceptance_checklist.criterion: T9 code-quality and slop review artifact
acceptance_checklist.scenario: Review artifact covers overfit, tautological tests, implementation-mirroring, extraction, scope drift, and secret handling.
acceptance_checklist.binary_observable: Artifact exists and the required rg command exits 0 with matches.

acceptance_checklist.criterion: whitespace gates for tracked and untracked owned paths
acceptance_checklist.scenario: Required diff whitespace check plus explicit no-index probes for untracked owned files.
acceptance_checklist.invocation: git diff --check tests/test_listing_inventory_api.py frontend/scripts .omo/evidence/dalya-listings-workspace-rebrand/task-9-tests.json; git diff --no-index --check /dev/null <owned path>
acceptance_checklist.binary_observable: Required git diff --check exited 0 with no output. Each no-index probe exited 1 because /dev/null differs from the file, with empty stdout/stderr, meaning no whitespace diagnostics were emitted.

commands.scenario: focused backend API tests with dotenv-loaded .env.test
commands.binary_observable: pytest process exit 0; six tests include normal row, set_logistics next-action branch, assignment scope, empty brokerage, multi-brokerage no-header fail-closed, and explicit brokerage B no-leak scenarios.

commands.result: 25 checks passed; 8 action href cases covered; 29 source files scanned; unsupported action and injected legacy href probes failed as expected.

dirty_worktree.probe: git status --short was captured before edits; unrelated dirty files were left untouched. Final scope inspection is limited to changed files in this evidence record.

cross_brokerage_leak.probe: Same user has assigned listings in two brokerages; selected brokerage B response must equal only the brokerage B listing id.

ambiguous_brokerage_context.probe: Same multi-membership user requests /api/v1/listings/mine without X-Brokerage-Id.

duplicated_frontend_logic.probe: Verifier no longer defines local applyInventoryView, matchesSearch, matchesStatus, matchesAttention, compareListings, or dateValue implementations.

temp_cleanup.probe: Verifier uses finally blocks for action module temp dir, extracted inventory helper temp dir, probe temp dir, and Date.now restoration.

symlink_loop_scan.probe: Recursive scanner uses lstatSync and skips symbolic links before descending directories.

flaky_tests.probe: Backend fixtures use uuid-scoped IDs and teardown; frontend verifier pins Date.now for recent activity checks.

prompt_injection.reason: No LLM or untrusted natural-language prompt path was added.

known_limitations: The frontend verifier is a static/transpiled harness rather than browser visual QA; T9 requested focused helper/action/link verification, not visual behavior.
No product UI/API implementation was changed, so this task verifies current behavior rather than fixing product route logic.

cleanup.runtime_temp_files: frontend verifier creates temporary compiled action, extracted inventory helper, and legacy href probe directories under the OS temp directory and removes them in finally blocks
